channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter always on streets / green - no bins, 14th March
item.description:
Hi, At the bottom of Mount Pleasant Hill and adjacent to Woodmill Road, there's always lots of litter on the street and the large green those roads surround. It's been like that for over a year at least. There just aren't any street bins in the area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uprooted tree following recent road traffic accident – tree needs replacing., 14th March
item.description:
A tree at this location was uprooted during a recent car accident. The area has been left without the tree and the ground where it stood appears disturbed. It would be good if the tree could be replaced as part of restoring the street environment.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaconsfield Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small branches. Cones, seeds blocking the gutter outside 108, 106 Ernest Grove and opposite, 14th March
item.description:
The public tree outside 106 has dropped cones, seeds and small branches in the strong winds and are blocking the gutter
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ernest Grove, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge freezer dumped on street, 14th March
item.description:
There is a fridge freezer dumped on Whiston Road outside Adelaide wharf.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Jct of Willes Road, 14th March
item.description:
Bollard and sheffield stand have been hit and damaged. As per photos LB Camden contractor Marlborough are on site for another scheme - could they make repairs to the items while they are in the area?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Prince of Wales Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 14th March
item.description:
Vehicle has not moved for months and in bad state of repair. VWcamper Brown parked on highway YLW 24X. NO MOT

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Coppetts Road, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junction of Willes Rd, 14th March
item.description:
Abandoned white bike for the last 3 months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Prince of Wales Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shit on play mound, 14th March
item.description:
See above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): London Fields East Side, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 14th March
item.description:
More rubbish is being added to the existing problem including 2 large boxes of household rubbish and some large paint pots.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holburne Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 5 dead Trees, 14th March
item.description:
Council put in 5 trees last year. They were planted at the wrong time of year and never watered, so inevitably died. Please remove.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Vista, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electricity cover on pavement degraded at edges, 14th March
item.description:
Toe caught on edge where concrete is missing. Tripped and led to a fall. Broken jaw in three places requiring six screws. Can it be resurfaced so it doesn’t cause a trip hazard ? On the pavement outside 2D. In last 5 days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2f, The Glebe, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal encampment, 14th March
item.description:
Someone has pitched a tent with the wooded area and is leaving rubbish around.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chapman's Lane, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole OPP 92 southwood road too, 14th March
item.description:
Pothole been there quite a while, carrier bag has taken up residence and loose chippings all over the roaf
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwood Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped fridge freezer, 14th March
item.description:
I’m sure no one will face any consequences for this as it’s a daily occurrence, but yet again another instance of fly tipping on the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes across whole stretch of carriageway, 14th March
item.description:
Hi there, there are some very large potholes stretching against lanes of traffic at this junction. This is causing damage to tyres / bicycle tyres also and is a hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Verney Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights very slow for Verney Rd going onto Ilderton Rd, 14th March
item.description:
Hi, the traffic lights are not on for very long for people coming out of Verney Rd onto Ildertom Road and then when they switch to red again they remain on red for a very very long time. This has resulted in people running red lights at the junction as they have waited for 5 minutes sometimes, which is very dangerous. Please could the timers be adjusted?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Verney Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light on pavement sides under the railway arch not working, 14th March
item.description:
Hi, the street light in the railway arch is not working on the pavement. The lights are at the top of the arch - please could the bulbs be replaced?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe New Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light on pavement sides under the railway arch not working, 14th March
item.description:
Hi, the street light in the railway arch is not working on the pavement. The lights are at the top of the arch - please could the bulbs be replaced?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe New Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated graffiti on cafe, 14th March
item.description:
Repeated graffiti across shutters, wooden façade and front door of café. Being removed by café every few weeks, for it to return immediately.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags spilled all over street, 14th March
item.description:
Several rubbish bags with food and recycling spilled all over the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazelbank Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
